name: Kraken Trading Operations
description: Constrained Kraken trading operations plugin. Agents stage intentions only; a minute cron routes intentions through deterministic safety checks before paper simulation or live limit-order execution gated by human approval or a capped autonomous budget.

settings.label: Enable Kraken trading cron
settings.description: When false, the minute cron exits before evaluating or executing staged intentions. Keep disabled until the local operator is ready. Bot policy is controlled by .kraken-bot/policy.yml.

settings.label: API key
settings.description: Kraken API key used internally by the execution guard for approved private Spot REST calls. Agents cannot directly sign or call raw endpoints.

settings.label: Personal key
settings.description: Kraken personal/private key (API secret) used internally to generate API-Sign headers for approved private Spot REST calls.

env.description: Optional environment fallback for the Kraken API key when the api_key plugin setting is unset.
Optional environment fallback for the Kraken personal/private key when the personal_key plugin setting is unset.

access.name: Kraken Trading Operations
access.description: Expose constrained intention-only Kraken trading operations tools to selected threads.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Read compact Kraken trading operations status.

tools.name: get_runtime_snapshot
tools.description: Read a redacted Kraken trading runtime snapshot.

tools.name: get_balances
tools.description: Read normalized non-zero Kraken account balances. Read-only.

tools.name: stage_intention
tools.description: Validate and store a trade intention for deterministic cron review; never places orders.

tools.name: list_intentions
tools.description: List staged and historical trade intentions.

tools.name: cancel_intention
tools.description: Cancel a local staged trade intention; does not cancel exchange orders.

tools.name: get_policy
tools.description: Read the active project-file-backed trading policy.

tools.name: get_journal_summary
tools.description: Read recent safe Kraken trading journal summaries.
